# Selio Marketing Co - AI Context File

Selio Marketing Co is a premium digital marketing and web development agency. 
We specialize in building elite web experiences, custom websites, and deploying strategic digital marketing campaigns to scale businesses. 

## Services
- Custom Web Development (React, Next.js, modern WebGL interactions)
- Branding and Identity
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Digital Marketing Campaigns

## Target Audience
We serve global businesses looking to elevate their brand presence and improve conversion rates through award-winning design and highly optimized code.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://selio-marketing.com
- Main pages: /about, /services, /work, /blog, /contact

## Developer Information
This website is built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, and Three.js. It features a fully responsive, dark-themed cinematic design with interactive components and smooth scroll transitions.
